title: Argentinian Chicken Broth
description: A comforting and light chicken broth recipe from Argentina, perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chicken stock cube, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Pour in the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the pot and shred or chop it into bite-sized pieces.
Return the chicken to the pot and add the chopped parsley.
Simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
